channel.title: uptrack Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
Breaking

  • macOS 26 is now required.

UI

  • Bezel HUD adopts SwiftUI Liquid Glass (replaces the NSVisualEffectView/hudWindow backdrop).
  • Bezel follows the system Light/Dark setting.
  • Settings "check for updates" button uses the new glass button style.
  • Menu-bar items show the Spotify logo (as a custom SF Symbol) and the Apple glyph inline before the source name.

Artwork

  • On macOS 26, MediaRemote no longer exposes artwork to third parties. Artwork is now fetched via AppleScript (Spotify: artwork URL + HTTP; Music: raw artwork data) and patched into the current track row.

item.title: Version 1.0.8
item.description:
Changes

  • Menu bar dropdown is now a native macOS menu with keyboard shortcuts (⌘, settings, ⌘Q quit).
  • Bezel stays dark regardless of system appearance (fixes washed-out look in Light mode).
  • Bezel reliably dismisses when the hotkey modifier is released — no more getting stuck while keys are held.

item.title: Version 1.0.7
item.description:
Fixes

  • Bezel no longer skips every other track when holding or tapping the hotkey.

item.title: Version 1.0.6
item.description:
Fixes & improvements

  • Shut down media, audio, and hotkey observers cleanly on quit.
  • Artwork resize and track-entry insert now run off the main thread.
  • Bezel reloads recent tracks on every re-open (was showing stale data).
  • Menu bar recent-track query moved off main; refresh debounced on track change.
  • Typed state machine replaces the MediaRemote-vs-distributed-notifications flag.
  • Safe fallback for malformed hex colors instead of release-stripped asserts.
  • Removed force-unwraps on the Application Support URL.
  • Bezel key polling 50 Hz → 30 Hz.
